message.content:
@startuml
participant "UserController" as UC
participant "ThemeController" as TC
participant "CommentController" as CC

section UserController
    UC.login() -> TC
    TC.Success(save session) <- UC
    alt [successful]
        UC.register() -> UC
    end
    alt [no register]
        UC.register() -> UC
    end
end

section ThemeController
    TC.list() -> UC
    UC.themeID -> CC
    CC.list(themeID) -> CC
    alt [your comments]
        CC.edit() -> CC
    end
    alt [not your comments]
        CC.can't edit -> CC
    end
    CC.add() -> CC
end

section CommentController
    UC.logOut() -> UC
end

@enduml
